dataset: Odoo 17 HR module with official demo data

pi_items.source: Verified in Odoo's official hr_demo.xml at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/odoo/odoo/master/addons/hr/data/hr_demo.xml - Marc Demo is listed as an Experienced Developer in R&D department with permanent contract
Task description in task.json line 5 specifies this as required description for the expense. This is a task instruction, not sourced from demo data.
Task description in task.json line 5 specifies this as required amount for the expense. This is a task instruction, not sourced from demo data.

Task description in task.json specifies 'Meals' as the Category. setup_task.sh lines 26-36 creates a Meals product with can_be_expensed=True if it doesn't exist. Product is created dynamically, not from demo data.

privileged_info_summary: The submit_expense_on_behalf task requires creating a new expense record in Odoo 17 HR module with employee Marc Demo (verified from official Odoo demo data at https://github.com/odoo/odoo/blob/master/addons/hr/data/hr_demo.xml as an R&D developer), description 'Client Dinner with Acme Corp', amount $145.50, and product 'Meals' (created by setup script if needed). The base employee comes from real Odoo official demo data, but the expense record itself is synthetic (does not exist in demo, must be created by agent). Admin credentials are admin/admin, Odoo URL is http://localhost:8069, and database is odoo_hr.
